---
title: '`syncweaver deps analyze`'
---

Analyze how host repositories use source packages, and optionally assess the
impact of a new release.

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver deps analyze --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

## Examples

```sh
# Analyze dependencies for a tracked path
syncweaver deps analyze --path code/mypackage
```
